ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Home ground of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "captain_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's captain */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Primary sponsor of the team */,
  "current_rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the team in the ongoing tournament */,
  "total_players" INTEGER /* Total number of players in the team */,
  "most_valuable_player" TEXT /* Most valuable player of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team playing the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team playing the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "toss_winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the toss */,
  "match_winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the match */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., runs, wickets) */,
  "result_margin" INTEGER /* Margin of the result (e.g., number of runs or wickets) */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season in which the match was played */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, playoff, final) */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the toss winner (e.g., bat, field) */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., completed, abandoned, postponed) */,
  "umpire1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first umpire */,
  "umpire2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second umpire */,
  "man_of_the_match" TEXT /* Player who won the man of the match award */,
  "total_runs_team1" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by team 1 */,
  "total_runs_team2" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by team 2 */,
  "total_overs_team1" INTEGER /* Total overs bowled by team 1 */,
  "total_overs_team2" INTEGER /* Total overs bowled by team 2 */,
  "total_wickets_team1" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken by team 1 */,
  "total_wickets_team2" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken by team 2 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_umpire1_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire1_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_match_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_umpire2_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire2_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_toss_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("toss_winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins in the tournament */,
  "avg_wins" REAL /* Average number of wins per match */,
  "win_after_toss_win" INTEGER /* Number of wins after winning the toss */,
  "win_after_toss_loss" INTEGER /* Number of wins after losing the toss */,
  "win_while_defending" INTEGER /* Number of wins while defending the total */,
  "win_while_chasing" INTEGER /* Number of wins while chasing the total */,
  "wins_by_runs" INTEGER /* Number of wins by runs */,
  "wins_by_wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wins by wickets */,
  "final_rank" INTEGER /* Final rank of the team in the tournament */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "total_matches_played" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played by the team in the season */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses in the season */,
  "total_draws" INTEGER /* Total number of matches that were drawn */,
  "total_abandoned_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches that were abandoned */,
  "total_runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total number of runs scored by the team in the season */,
  "total_wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Total number of wickets taken by the team in the season */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score achieved by the team in a single match */,
  "lowest_score" INTEGER /* Lowest score achieved by the team in a single match */,
  "best_bowling_figures" TEXT /* Best bowling figures achieved by the team in a single match */,
  "total_boundaries" INTEGER /* Total number of boundaries (4s and 6s) scored by the team in the season */,
  "total_sixes" INTEGER /* Total number of sixes scored by the team in the season */,
  "total_fours" INTEGER /* Total number of fours scored by the team in the season */,
  "total_dot_balls" INTEGER /* Total number of dot balls bowled by the team in the season */,
  "total_maiden_overs" INTEGER /* Total number of maiden overs bowled by the team in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the platform */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "total_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams participating in the season */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches in the season */,
  "total_venues" INTEGER /* Total number of venues used in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)
